data.name: 好兄弟的妹妹
data.detailed_description:
当火花在不该燃烧的地方点燃，会发生什么？我最好的朋友的妹妹是一部火辣的视觉小说，将你卷入一场关于诱惑、秘密欲望与抉择的旋风之中，这些选择将影响你的人生。

一切从一个普通的夜晚开始——你、你最好的朋友，还有他那群吵闹的伙伴，在酒精与下流的故事中度过。可真正的故事发生在最后一杯酒之后。当你在朋友家留宿时，遇见了一个让你彻夜难眠的人——他的妹妹。

她聪明、调皮，而且无法抗拒地迷人。今晚，她的目光中充满了无声的承诺，言语间带着大胆的邀请。她显然在玩一场游戏，而你，就是她的目标。

选择在你手中：

  • 屈服于诱惑？ 参与她危险的调情，冒着失去最重要友情的风险，度过一个充满激情的夜晚。

  • 克制自己？ 保持对朋友的忠诚，试着忘掉这次令人心跳的邂逅，却永远无法不去想“如果那时……”

你的每一个决定都会塑造人际关系，解锁新的场景、对话和结局。你能抵抗住诱惑吗？还是让欲望主宰一切？

主要特色：

🔥 充满刺激转折的剧情 融入一个每个夜晚都隐藏秘密、每个选择都带来意外后果的故事。一次普通的留宿变成了关于诱惑与忠诚的高风险游戏。

🎨 惊艳的高质量美术 沉浸于精心打造的世界。精美绘制的人物与场景让每个地点——从喧闹的酒吧到温柔的卧室——都细致入微，令人身临其境。

💘 流畅的动态亲密场景 通过逼真而沉浸的成人动画感受那一刻的炽热与激情，让故事的张力和情感真正鲜活。

🍻 男人之夜与大胆的酒吧故事 加入他们的夜晚，聆听挑逗且无所保留的浪漫逸事。这些故事不仅令人发笑，也许还能教会你一些东西。

✨ 富有意义的选择驱动玩法 这不是简单的对或错。你的每个细微决定都会动态改变关系并引向不同结局。重玩以发现所有可能的结果！

data.short_description: 在朋友家的夜晚，化作在欲望与克制之间的诱人抉择。
data.supported_languages:
英文*, 法文, 義大利文, 德文, 西班牙文 - 西班牙, 西班牙文 - 拉丁美洲, 繁體中文, 簡體中文, 韓文, 荷蘭文, 波蘭文, 葡萄牙文 - 巴西, 葡萄牙文 - 葡萄牙, 俄文, 土耳其文, 日文
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統: Windows 10
  • 處理器: Intel Core 2 Duo E4700
  • 記憶體: 8 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Intel HD 4000
  • 儲存空間: 1 GB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統

mac_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Version 10.11+
  • 處理器: Intel Core 2 Duo E4700
  • 記憶體: 8 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Intel HD 4000
  • 儲存空間: 2 GB 可用空間

linux_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Steam OS or Ubuntu 16.04
  • 處理器: Intel Core 2 Duo E4700
  • 記憶體: 8 GB 記憶體
  • 儲存空間: 2 GB 可用空間

data.name: My Best Friend's Sister
data.detailed_description:
What happens when a spark ignites where it absolutely shouldn't? My Best Friend's Sister is a sizzling visual novel that pulls you into a whirlwind of temptation, secret desires, and choices that will echo through your life.

It all starts with a typical night out—you, your best friend, and his rowdy crew, drowning in drinks and sharing raunchy stories that would make anyone blush. But the real story begins after the last call. Crashing at your friend's place for the night, you come face-to-face with the one person who won't let you sleep: his younger sister.

She's sharp, playful, and impossibly alluring. And tonight, her gaze is full of unspoken promises, her words laced with a daring invitation. She's clearly playing a game, and you're her intended target.

The Choice is Yours:

  • Give in to Temptation? Engage in her dangerous flirtation and risk a night of passion that could shatter your most important friendship.

  • Take the High Road? Stay loyal to your friend and try to forget this charged encounter, always wondering "what if..."

Every decision you make shapes your relationships, unlocking new scenes, dialogue, and endings. Will you resist? Or will you let desire take control?

Key Features:

🔥 A Compelling Story with Spicy Twists
Dive into a narrative where every night holds new secrets, and every choice leads to unexpected consequences. A simple sleepover turns into a high-stakes game of seduction and loyalty.

🎨 Stunning, High-Quality Artwork
Immerse yourself in a beautifully crafted world. Featuring exquisitely illustrated characters and scenes, every location—from the noisy bar to the intimate bedroom—is rendered with stunning detail to pull you into the story.

💘 Smooth, Animated Intimate Scenes
Experience the heat of the moment with fluid and immersive adult animations that bring the passion and intensity of the story to life.

🍻 Guy's Night Out & Raunchy Bar Tales
Become one of the guys as you listen to their provocative and uncensored stories of romantic escapades and misadventures. These tales aren't just for laughs—they might even teach you a thing or two.

✨ Meaningful Choice-Driven Gameplay
This isn't about simple right or wrong answers. Your seemingly small decisions dynamically alter your relationships and directly lead to multiple endings. Replay to discover every possible outcome!

data.short_description: A night at your best friend’s house turns into a tempting choice between desire and restraint.
data.supported_languages:
English*, French, Italian, German, Spanish - Spain, Spanish - Latin America, Traditional Chinese, Simplified Chinese, Korean, Dutch, Polish, Portuguese - Brazil, Portuguese - Portugal, Russian, Turkish, Japanese
*languages with full audio support
